generated_oml:
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for ambient temperature measurement with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for heatbed temperature measurement with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for air temperature measurement inside incubator with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, PythonScipyEnabler, RaspberryPi4Enabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with 2 parameters for temperature prediction using differential equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler, RaspberryPi4Enabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with 4 parameters for temperature prediction using differential equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler, RaspberryPi4Enabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for message queuing and routing of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, BangBangControlService, ModelCalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for data acquisition and control execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, BangBangControlService, ModelCalibrationService
]

instance PythonScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed for thermal regulation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow for air circulation"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation and current handling (~4A)"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for incubator system components"
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "0.03 m³ styrofoam insulated container for incubator system"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, AmbientTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPi4Enabler, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply
]

instance PredictiveTemperatureSimulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature simulation for informing control decisions"
]

instance SafetyViolationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring output triggering human intervention for violations"
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic temperature regulation via bang-bang control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CalibrationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of model calibration via non-linear least squares optimization"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A with 2 parameters, Model B with 4 parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveTemperatureSimulation
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlert
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration via non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResult
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed activation, fan speed) generated by the controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver for actuation of physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system integrates physical components (heatbed, fan, sensors), RabbitMQ communication layer, controller logic, and simulation models for bidirectional data exchange and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates during the as-operated phase of the physical system's lifecycle, integrating models post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity assessed through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1) and residual error minimization using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver; Model B demonstrated superior prediction of heatbed thermal inertia."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitates communication between physical components and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) are hosted on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain operational safety; optocouplers provide electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators."
]
